sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 100), (2, 'B', NULL), (3, 'C', -50), (4, 'D', 0);
CREATE TABLE reference_table (ref_id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_value VARCHAR(20));
SELECT name, listagg(CAST(value << 1 AS VARCHAR), ', ') OVER (PARTITION BY name) AS aggregated_value FROM test_table;

SELECT t.id, t.name, listagg(CAST(t.value AS VARCHAR), '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value) AS aggregated_values FROM test_table AS t WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.id HAVING COUNT(t.value) > 1;

SELECT rt.ref_value, SUM(t.value << 2) AS total_value FROM reference_table rt JOIN test_table t ON rt.ref_id = (t.id << 1) WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rt.ref_value HAVING SUM(t.value << 2) > 100;
SELECT DISTINCT name, (listagg(name, ', ') OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY created_at)) << 2 AS combined_names FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT t1.name, listagg(t1.value << 1, '|') OVER (ORDER BY t1.id) AS shifted_values FROM test_table t1 INNER JOIN reference_table rt ON t1.id = rt.ref_id << 1 WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.name;
SELECT rt.ref_value, COUNT(*) AS num_rows FROM reference_table rt LEFT JOIN test_table t ON rt.ref_id = t.id << 2 WHERE t.value IS NULL GROUP BY rt.ref_value HAVING num_rows > 0;
